user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new travel mode, so that employees can select approved modes of travel.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Travel Modes screen; When I click Add New Travel Mode and enter the details; Then the new travel mode is saved and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to associate travel vendors with a travel mode, so that the correct vendors are offered for each mode.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am adding or editing a travel mode; When I select travel vendors; Then the vendors are linked and shown in the Travel vendors column

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to define preferred distance and travel time ranges for each mode, so that appropriate travel modes are suggested based on the trip.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am configuring a travel mode; When I set the preferred distance range (Kms) and preferred travel time range (Hrs); Then the ranges are saved and displayed in the list

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit an existing travel mode, so that I can keep vendor and range details current.
acceptance_criteria: Given a travel mode exists in the list; When I click Edit and update its details; Then the changes are saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the travel modes list, so that I see the most recent configuration.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Travel Modes screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with current travel modes
